checklist.description: Each proposal names a specific relation type rather than using a generic relation label
checklist.name: Typed edges

checklist.description: Leaves all new relations in proposed state instead of accepted state
checklist.name: Proposed status

checklist.description: Every proposal includes a concise rationale explaining why the chosen relation applies
checklist.name: Rationale field

checklist.description: Every proposal includes an explicit confidence value
checklist.name: Confidence field

checklist.description: Every proposal includes evidence references such as scope tags, file paths, symbols, or other stable identifiers
checklist.name: Evidence refs

checklist.description: Every proposal records reviewedBy and reviewedAt fields
checklist.name: Reviewer identity

checklist.description: Every proposal records proposalMethod and workingSet metadata
checklist.name: Proposal method

checklist.description: Includes a packet summarizing proposal counts by relation type and any skipped candidates or open questions
checklist.name: Review summary

context: Tests whether the agent proposes typed entry relations with explicit rationale and the required metadata contract, while leaving the relations unaccepted by default.
